description:
Build launch operational dashboards and alarms using AWS-native tooling.

**Scope**
- Dashboard/alarms for webhook receipt/signature failures, DLQ depth, MDI error/418 rate, Stripe webhook failures, onboarding drop-off/error counts, scheduled reconciliation failures, and deployment health.
- Include runbook links for each alarm.
- Avoid Datadog/Metabase for launch unless a separate vendor/compliance decision approves them.

**Acceptance**
- Launch operators can see system health from CloudWatch.
- Each alarm has owner/channel/runbook metadata.
- Dashboard contains no PHI and no questionnaire payload data.
title: CloudWatch ops dashboards + launch alarms
